_comment: RCA-22 inventory of legacy/stale API and RPC surfaces that remain for compatibility. Keep entries evidence-backed; src/__tests__/api/legacy-api-inventory.test.ts enforces required quiz surfaces and non-empty deprecation metadata.

entries.name: submit_quiz_results
entries.risk: Legacy v1 quiz submission path remains callable for mobile/fallback clients; it needed July ownership/cap fixes and is less exercised than the server-only route.
entries.deprecationCondition: All web and mobile quiz submitters use /api/quiz/submit or /api/v2/quiz/submit with idempotency keys; direct PostgREST calls are blocked by the web User-Agent flag; no active clients observed in marking-path telemetry for one release window.
entries.plannedAction: After cutover evidence, flip ff_reject_web_legacy_submit_quiz_results for web, publish mobile deprecation calendar, then prepare a reviewed migration to revoke/drop the legacy v1 RPC.

entries.name: submit_quiz_results_rpc
entries.risk: Compatibility wrapper can mask missing/changed submit_quiz_results signatures by falling through overload attempts and returning JSON success-shaped payloads.
entries.deprecationCondition: No route, client, or mobile caller depends on the wrapper; direct RPC access inventory confirms only canonical server submit routes remain.
entries.plannedAction: Keep documented until mobile/web cutover completes; then revoke execute from anon/authenticated or drop in the same reviewed legacy-cleanup migration as v1.

entries.name: submit_quiz_results_safe
entries.risk: Safe wrapper preserves a simplified legacy submit path that can hide RPC errors behind { ok: false } instead of the canonical server route contract.
entries.deprecationCondition: No current clients or server routes call this wrapper; staging smoke confirms canonical submit route handles retry/error semantics.
entries.plannedAction: Revoke or drop with the legacy v1 cleanup migration after direct caller inventory is clean.

entries.name: client_direct_submit_quiz_results_v2
entries.risk: Client-side direct submit_quiz_results_v2 calls bypass the server-only /api/quiz/submit route's uniform request validation, idempotency envelope, and observability surface.
entries.deprecationCondition: ff_server_only_quiz_submit is enabled for target environments; web and mobile submitters use the server route; SLC-5 rejected/flagged mastery semantics are decided.
entries.plannedAction: Repoint remaining clients to /api/quiz/submit or /api/v2/quiz/submit, then update the SLC-8 pin from compatibility to hard server-only enforcement.
